note: Fixture paths are stable contracts for the committed offline demo recordings produced during corpus generation.

analyzer_demos.title: A clean rising má
analyzer_demos.description: A correct sắc-tone sample for judges without a microphone.
analyzer_demos.expected_verdict: That rise landed on má, mother.

analyzer_demos.title: Má flattened into ma
analyzer_demos.description: The learner intends mother but produces the level-tone word for ghost.
analyzer_demos.expected_verdict: You meant má, mother. You said ma, a ghost.

analyzer_demos.title: The Phương name test
analyzer_demos.description: The learner intends the level-tone name but lets it fall into phường.
analyzer_demos.expected_verdict: You meant Phương, the name. You said phường, an urban ward.

echo_demos.title: A ghost at dinner
echo_demos.committed_transcript: Tối nay con mời ma đi ăn cơm.
echo_demos.expected_explanation: You said ma, a ghost, instead of má, mother. You invited a ghost to dinner.
